incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect equation on first attempt

steps.text: Check the bags. How many bags do you see? How many apples in each?

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect equation on second attempt

params.description: Bags highlight to draw attention to the groups.

steps.text: Let's count together. I see 3 bags. In each bag, I count 4 apples. The first slot needs the number of bags. The second slot needs how many are in each bag. The last slot is the total.

incorrects.description: Student placed incorrect equation three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System demonstrates placing tiles: first 3, then 4, then 12. Each tile slides into position.

steps.text: Here's how this works. First, I count the bags: 3. That goes in the first slot. Then I count what's in each bag: 4. That goes in the second slot. Finally, I count all the apples: 12. That's the product, so it goes in the last slot. The equation is 3 times 4 equals 12. 3 groups of 4 equals 12 total.
